creator: aphor@me.com
text:
High Speed Rails has sent notification to all customers that they will cease operating all services on August 1, 2009. They have stopped responding to service requests over a week ago, but there is a notice posted to the High Speed Rails Blog page with the same announcement. Service offering pages are still available on their web site, which may lead to confusion.

Fix: 

High Speed Rails should be removed from listings at http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/isp.html

I hope you know where to find the xml files.. I couldn't find them in svn, and the CVS copies seem to be out of date.
How-To-Repeat: n/a
